# drop_table { #cdmconnector.drop_table }

```python
drop_table(cdm, name)
```

Drop one or more tables from the write schema.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type               | Description                              | Default    |
|--------|--------------------|------------------------------------------|------------|
| cdm    | Cdm                | CDM reference (must be database-backed). | _required_ |
| name   | str or list\[str\] | Logical table name(s) to drop.           | _required_ |
